message:
Anthropic: estimate reasoning_tokens, add Retry-After coverage test

Fixes D-13: when thinking blocks are present, estimates reasoning_tokens
using chars/4 heuristic since Anthropic doesn't provide a native count.
Applied in both Complete() and Stream() paths.

Covers spec 8.2: verifies that Anthropic adapter parses Retry-After
header on 429 responses and sets it on the error object.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
